text.title: Serverless Architecture Foundations Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (workload, provider, IAM, observability)?

text.example: Workload: webhook receiver. r1 fits (200ms). r2: stateless using DynamoDB. r3: single SQS trigger. r4: X-Ray + correlation id. r5: SAM template. All ten checklist items green. Recommendation: proceed to pattern selection.
